sentence: 这味草药药性温和，适合老人服用。
pinyin: Zhè wèi cǎoyào yàoxìng wēnhé, shìhé lǎorén fúyòng.
english: This herbal medicine has a mild medicinal effect and is suitable for the elderly.

meaning: affected; artificial; to make; to manufacture
sentence: 他说话太造作了，听起来很假。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà tài zàozuò le, tīng qǐlái hěn jiǎ.
english: The way he talks is too affected; it sounds very fake.

meaning: principal; main; flagship (product); title (track); to specialize in;
sentence: 这家餐厅主打川菜，口味很正宗。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng zhǔdǎ chuāncài, kǒuwèi hěn zhèngzōng.
english: This restaurant's main focus is Sichuan cuisine and the flavors are very authentic.

sentence: 山顶上有一座历史悠久的道观。
pinyin: Shāndǐng shàng yǒu yī zuò lìshǐ yōujiǔ de dàoguàn.
english: There is a centuries-old Daoist temple at the top of the mountain.

meaning: the reverse side of sth.; opposite side of a topic
sentence: 纸的反面还有字，别扔掉。
pinyin: Zhǐ de fǎnmiàn hái yǒu zì, bié rēng diào.
english: There's writing on the back of the paper — don't throw it away.
